article_meta.title: US News exclusive ICE agent who opened fire on Renee Good was dragged, hospitalized by illegal migrant driver last year

reasoning: Mostly neutral paraphrase with attribution; avoids the article’s most charged rhetoric. Minor adoption of politically loaded terminology (e.g., "illegal migrant") and slight emphasis on law-enforcement framing. Some perspectives present in the article (e.g., Gov. Walz’s criticism) are omitted.

custom_reasoning.spin: Verbs are largely neutral and factual; no use of the article’s most loaded verbs.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Key contested points (e.g., self-defense, car contact) are attributed to authorities; stats sourced to DHS.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Evaluations (self-defense, motives) are attributed; few subjective claims stated as fact.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Avoids phrases like "mob of agitators" or "sky-rocketing"; tone remains measured.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks in the model’s voice.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about intentions or thoughts.
custom_reasoning.slant: Focuses on law-enforcement accounts and defenses; protesters’ perspective mentioned only briefly; governor’s criticism omitted.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Leaves out Gov. Walz’s critical framing that appears in the article.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Limited use (e.g., "significant injuries") and broadly factual.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Uses politically charged term "illegal migrant" and "crackdown"; otherwise neutral.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Balance tracks the article’s events and data without amplifying alarm.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: Relies mainly on official sources (DHS, President) with minimal space for grassroots critics.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Noticeably more neutral than the source but carries a couple of loaded terms.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Includes DHS/administration viewpoints and mentions protesters, but omits the governor’s anti-ICE framing present in the article.
